name: spectest
description: Declarative API testing CLI for fast HTTP endpoint and REST API tests

scripts.build: npx -y esbuild src/cli.ts src/helpers.ts src/recordings.ts src/recording-preload.ts src/throttle-preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --packages=external --outdir=dist --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node"
scripts.build:prod: npx -y esbuild src/cli.ts src/helpers.ts src/recordings.ts src/recording-preload.ts src/throttle-preload.ts --bundle --minify --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --packages=external --outdir=dist --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node"

author: Justice Ogbonna <dev@justiceo.com>
